channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Israeli forces seize Beaufort Castle in major Lebanon offensive
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israeli army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion in 26 years
- Israeli army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into country in 26 years
- Israel seizes Crusader castle in Lebanon
- Israeli forces push further into south Lebanon, seize Beaufort castle
- Israel expands Lebanon offensive after capturing historic castle
- Israel moves deeper into Lebanon, captures medieval castle (VIDEOS)
- The largest Israeli advance into Lebanon in years
- Israeli army captures strategic Crusader-built castle in Lebanon
- Israel Captures Crusader Castle That Symbolized Its Long Lebanon Occupation
- Israel Captures Crusader Castle That Symbolized Its Long Lebanon Occupation
- Israel captures Crusader castle in deepening Lebanon push
- Israel Captures Crusader Castle as It Expands Invasion of Lebanon
- Israel captures strategic fortress during advance in southern Lebanon
- Middle East: Israel captures key fortress amid Lebanon push
- Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
- Israel captures strategic Crusader-built castle as incursion into southern Lebanon deepens
- Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
- Israel captures Crusader castle in deepening Lebanon push
- Israeli army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into country in 26 years
- Israel captures southern Lebanon fortress amid expanding operations
- Israel captures southern Lebanon fortress amid expanding operations
- Israeli army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into country in 26 years
- Israel seizes strategic castle as it expands invasion of south Lebanon
- Israel seizes strategic castle as it expands invasion of south Lebanon
- Israel captures Lebanon's medieval Beaufort Castle in 'deepest incursion in 26 years'
- Israel claims control of strategic Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon
- Israeli army captures strategic castle in S. Lebanon
- Middle East crisis live: Israeli army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into country in 26 years
- Israel troops capture Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon push against Hezbollah
- Israel captures strategic Lebanon castle after days of fighting despite ceasefire
- Israel troops capture Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon push against Hezbollah
- Israeli Army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into country in 26 years
- Urgent: Israeli army captures strategic castle in S. Lebanon]]>

- Trump asked for tougher terms in proposed Iran war deal: US media]]>

item.title: Japan rejects 'new militarism', accuses China of rapidly arming
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Japan Denies ‘New Militarism’ After China Claims

- Japan’s Koizumi rejects China accusations of ‘new militarism’
- Japan refutes 'new militarism', accuses China of rapidly arming without transparency
- Japan defence minister denies militarism, criticises China's 'huge arsenal'
- Japan shrugs off China's 'new militarism' label
- Japan defence minister denies militarism and criticises China's 'huge arsenal'
- Japan’s Koizumi rejects China accusations of ‘new militarism’
- Japanese defence minister rejects ‘new militarism’ label from China in Shangri-La speech
- Japan defence minister rebuffs claims of ‘new militarism’ levelled by China
- Japan refutes 'new militarism', accuses China of rapidly arming]]>
